title: Junior Revenue Manager at Beyond Wildlife India Asia Pacific Associates
company: Beyond Wildlife India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Junior Revenue Manager at Beyond Wildlife India Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
We at Beyond Wildlife India Asia Pacific Associates are looking for an experienced Revenue Manager based out of Patna. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Beyond Wildlife India Asia Pacific Associates:
Beyond Wildlife India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Travel Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Beyond Wildlife India Asia Pacific Associates!
